params.description: Student's 12-tile rectangle animates smoothly from free-placed positions to grid-aligned coordinates. Each tile moves to its nearest grid cell. Ambiguous overlaps resolve to one tile per cell; extras removed with undo affordance visible. Grid snap toggles ON.

beats.text: Watch what happens to your rectangle. It's snapping into the grid. Same rectangle, easier to read.

elements.description: Hundred Grid in Mode B with grid snap ON. 12 tiles arranged in a rectangle, now aligned to grid coordinates. Numeric labels hidden. Side handles not exposed.
Sentence Builder displaying completed template from prior section: '___ tiles fill ___ rows of ___, so the area is ___ square units' with all slots filled.

params.description: One row of the snapped rectangle highlights to draw attention to row structure.

beats.text: Tap a highlighted row or side to show you see the rows.
Tap a highlighted row or side.

validator.description: Student tapped the highlighted row or grid surface, acknowledging the structure

elements.description: Hundred Grid in Mode B with grid snap ON. 12 tiles in rectangle, grid-aligned. One row highlighted. Numeric labels hidden. Side handles not exposed.
Sentence Builder displaying completed template from prior section.

beats.text: Do you see the rows? Every row has the same number of squares.

elements.description: Hundred Grid in Mode B with grid snap ON. 12 tiles in rectangle, grid-aligned. No highlights. Numeric labels hidden. Side handles not exposed.
Sentence Builder displaying completed template from prior section.
